query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_students FROM students;
SELECT fullName, COUNT(*) as count FROM students GROUP BY fullName HAVING count > 1 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_students FROM students;
SELECT fullName, COUNT(*) as count FROM students GROUP BY fullName HAVING count > 1 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
